_README: ADVERSARIAL Stage-1 gate stress set (100% SYNTHETIC, authored 2026-06-20). Purpose: find out whether the keyword+lexical gate actually BREAKS — not whether it works on easy real news. Every event is crafted to probe one failure mode: (P) PARAPHRASED drift that uses none of the gate's keywords; (V) UNSEEN VOCABULARY for a high-risk predicate (PEP via 'cabinet minister', derivatives via 'perpetual contracts'); (N) HARD NEGATIVE that shares a keyword but is risk-irrelevant (tests precision/false-positives). All entities/events are invented. Labels in adversarial_gold.json reflect what a competent KYC analyst would re-examine — NOT rigged to make a point. Run: python -m eval.gate.run --dataset eval/gate/adversarial.json --gold eval/gate/adversarial_gold.json

companies.onboarded_as: Zug-based B2B SaaS analytics startup, founder-owned, Swiss-only, no crypto (SYNTHETIC)

beliefs.business_model: B2B SaaS analytics dashboards for Swiss SMEs
beliefs.product_mix: Subscription analytics software; no trading, custody or financial products
beliefs.regulatory_status: Not a financial institution; commercial registration only, no FINMA authorisation
beliefs.ubo: Two named founders; privately held and founder-controlled
beliefs.source_of_wealth: Bootstrapped subscription revenue and a single seed round
beliefs.digital_asset_policy: No digital-asset activity; nothing crypto on the balance sheet
beliefs.pep_status: No politically exposed person among directors or owners
beliefs.adverse_media_status: No adverse media, investigation or litigation

events.summary: Helvetia re-domiciles its parent holding company from Zug to the Cayman Islands and relocates its principal place of business there.
events._probe: P: offshore geography move, but 'Cayman / re-domicile / relocate' are not gate keywords

events.summary: A consortium led by an overseas family office has taken a controlling economic interest in the group, with the founders stepping back to minority positions.
events._probe: P: inbound ownership change phrased without 'new owner / stake in'

events.summary: Helvetia appoints a former federal cabinet minister as non-executive chairman of its board.
events._probe: V: textbook PEP, but the word 'PEP' never appears

events.summary: Helvetia is sunsetting its analytics suite to build infrastructure for moving value between financial institutions.
events._probe: P: business-model pivot with no crypto/trading/brokerage vocabulary

events.summary: Helvetia has begun holding a portion of corporate reserves in tokenised money-market instruments.
events._probe: V: digital-asset exposure via 'tokenised money-market', not 'crypto/btc/stablecoin'

events.summary: Helvetia received a cease-and-desist directive from the market authority over unregistered activity.
events._probe: V: regulatory enforcement; 'cease-and-desist / market authority' miss the reg keywords (adverse-media never-gate should still keep the event)

events.summary: Helvetia launches a regulated crypto brokerage and custody service for institutional clients.
events._probe: TP sanity: obvious drift, must still pass on keywords

events.summary: Two senior Helvetia executives departed amid a confidential internal review into procurement irregularities.
events._probe: Adverse media with no adverse keyword — relies entirely on the never-gate

events.summary: Helvetia's CEO gave a TEDx talk on the history of money and banking.
events._probe: N: 'banking' triggers business_model/regulatory keywords but is risk-irrelevant punditry

events.summary: Helvetia expands its employee wellness program and opens a new on-site gym.
events._probe: N: 'expands' triggers geography/business keywords but is risk-irrelevant

events.summary: Helvetia acquired a 3% minority stake in an industry standards consortium.
events._probe: N: outbound minority 'stake in' — does NOT change Helvetia's own UBO (precision test)

events.summary: A Helvetia blog post showcased how its analytics dashboards can chart any dataset, including crypto prices.
events._probe: N: 'crypto' keyword in content marketing that actually confirms the SaaS baseline

beliefs.business_model: Regulated institutional crypto brokerage and custody
beliefs.product_mix: Spot crypto brokerage, custody and OTC; no retail, no derivatives
beliefs.ubo: Two institutional shareholders via a holding vehicle; no individual holds over 25%
beliefs.digital_asset_policy: Custodies client crypto in segregated cold storage
beliefs.pep_status: No politically exposed person among directors or owners
beliefs.sanctions_status: No sanctions exposure; screens all counterparties
beliefs.adverse_media_status: No adverse media, investigation or litigation

events.summary: Adriatic is reported to have processed transactions for an entity later added to the OFAC SDN list.
events._probe: TP sanity (critical): sanctions keywords + never-gate must keep this

events.summary: A newly disclosed beneficial owner of the group is the son of a sitting foreign minister.
events._probe: V: PEP-adjacent NEW beneficial owner; neither 'PEP' nor 'new owner' keywords appear

events.summary: Adriatic has quietly begun offering leveraged perpetual contracts to selected clients.
events._probe: V: derivatives drift on a 'no derivatives' belief; 'perpetual contracts / leveraged' miss product keywords

events.summary: Adriatic expanded its compliance team and opened a new staff training centre.
events._probe: N: 'expanded' triggers geography keyword but is risk-irrelevant
